title: Too many ads
body: Every conversion is interrupted by a full screen video ad. Completely unusable.

title: Slow PDF export
body: Converting a PDF to images takes far too long and sometimes just hangs.

title: No HEIC
body: It cannot open HEIC photos from my iPhone which defeats the whole purpose.

title: Works great
body: Quick and simple for turning screenshots into a single PDF. No issues at all.
